---
title: "API"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

url <- "https://api.footprintnetwork.org/v1/types"
user_name <- "username"
api_key <- "1gs79s099C3TboOH32857V43Bur6rQssvLHAjF9e5B0GB23I65V6"

response <- GET(
  url,
  authenticate(user = user_name, password = api_key, type = "basic"),
  add_headers(Accept = "application/json")
)

response
```

```{r}
codes <- c("BCpc", "BCtot", "EFCpc", "EFCtot", "earth", "pop", "hdi", "gdp")
```

```{r}

url_2019 <- "https://api.footprintnetwork.org/v1/data/all/2019/all"
url_2020 <- "https://api.footprintnetwork.org/v1/data/all/2020/all"

res_2019 <- GET(
  url_2019,
  authenticate(user_name, api_key, type = "basic"),
  add_headers(Accept = "application/json")
)

res_2020 <- GET(
  url_2020,
  authenticate(user_name, api_key, type = "basic"),
  add_headers(Accept = "application/json")
)



data_2019 <- fromJSON(rawToChar(res_2019$content))
data_2020 <- fromJSON(rawToChar(res_2020$content))

all_data <- bind_rows(data_2019,data_2020)
all_data
  
```

```{r}
wide_data <- all_data |>
  select(year, countryName, isoa2, record, value) |>
    pivot_wider(
    names_from = record,
    values_from = value
    ) |>
  rename(country = countryName)
  


```

```{r}
left_join(plastics, wide_data, by = c("country", "year"))
```

```{r}
url_china_hdi_2020 <- "https://api.footprintnetwork.org/v1/data/41/2020/hdi"
res <- GET(
  url_china_hdi_2020,
  authenticate(user_name, api_key, type = "basic"),
  add_headers(Accept = "application/json")
)

china_hdi_2020 <- fromJSON(rawToChar(res$content))
china_hdi_2020
```
